\boxed{C}  

Statement I is true because maximum throughput is inversely proportional to clock cycle time, and M-7 has a shorter cycle (7.5 ns vs. 10 ns). Statement II is false since latency equals number of stages times cycle time, giving M-5 50 ns and M-7 52.5 ns. Statement III is false because pipeline depth and clock speed do not guarantee faster execution for all programs due to hazards and other factors.
